name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Morning {{firstName}},

Just a warm hello from the {{orgName}} front desk. Yesterday brought a few new faces reaching out and a handful of visits on the books — nothing that needs chasing, just a gentle picture before the day gets going.

If anything looks off when you log in, we'll walk through it together. Otherwise, enjoy the coffee.

— The {{orgName}} team
